criterion: Learning candidates require Kaggle mechanics parity (make test-kaggle-parity), tier-2 production training throughput within the launch-hygiene-e2e baseline pass band, and learn-proof ladder VERIFIED at calibrated thresholds.

primary_profile.notes: PRIMARY_E2E_OVERRIDES + training/base.yaml format_weights 2:1.0 / 4:0.0 → single two_player rollout group (32 envs). Does not exercise 4p-only or mixed 2p+4p.

supplementary_format_coverage.label: 4p_only
supplementary_format_coverage.notes: Advisory until a 4p baseline is captured; does not block Phase 2 env-parity.

supplementary_format_coverage.label: 2p4p_split
supplementary_format_coverage.notes: Mixed-format production path; advisory until recalibrated baseline.

decision: Phase 1 U1 2p-only anchor throughput gate FAIL (reject) at worktree commit 00746bac (~7755 env_steps/s vs 8799 floor); learn-proof ceiling and Kaggle parity captures still pending before env-parity substrate.
